result.user_query: Which segment had the highest revenue in FY2025?
result.validated_sql:
SELECT segment_name, revenue_usd_millions
FROM financial_performance_by_segment
WHERE fiscal_year = 2025
  AND revenue_usd_millions = (
    SELECT MAX(revenue_usd_millions)
    FROM financial_performance_by_segment
    WHERE fiscal_year = 2025
  )
